mapper.sql: r.id, r.place_name, r.category_id, r.address, r.longitude, r.latitude, r.contact_info, r.report_type, r.content, r.images, r.reporter_name, r.reporter_phone, r.status, r.audit_remark, r.audit_time, r.audit_by, r.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT , c.name as category_name, a.real_name as audit_by_name FROM report r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN admin a ON r.audit_by = a.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT , c.name as category_name, a.real_name as audit_by_name FROM report r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN admin a ON r.audit_by = a.id ORDER BY r.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report ( place_name, category_id, address, longitude, latitude, contact_info, report_type, content, images, reporter_name, reporter_phone, status, create_time ) VALUES ( #{placeName}, #{categoryId}, #{address}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{contactInfo}, #{reportType}, #{content}, #{images}, #{reporterName}, #{reporterPhone}, 0, NOW() )

INSERT INTO report ( place_name, category_id, address, longitude, latitude, contact_info, report_type, content, images, reporter_name, reporter_phone, status, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.placeName}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.address}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.contactInfo}, #{item.reportType}, #{item.content}, #{item.images}, #{item.reporterName}, #{item.reporterPhone}, 0, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE report SET status = #{status}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = #{auditTime} WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM report WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT report_type as reportType, CASE WHEN report_type = 1 THEN '新增' WHEN report_type = 2 THEN '纠错' WHEN report_type = 3 THEN '反馈' ELSE '其他' END as typeName, COUNT(*) as count FROM report GROUP BY report_type ORDER BY report_type

SELECT , c.name as category_name, a.real_name as audit_by_name FROM report r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN admin a ON r.audit_by = a.id WHERE r.reporter_phone = #{reporterPhone} ORDER BY r.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE YEARWEEK(create_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(create_time) = MONTH(CURDATE())
